NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-01-2009 Off Calendar

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Reset To Oct-01-09 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder Adult Abuse TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Temp: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542, Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Andrew S. Schultz, Esq. for Maxine Duncan, Petitioner.

No appearance by the Respondent.

Mr. Schultz stated that they were still unable to serve the Respondent and requested a reissuance. The Court continued the matter and signed the reissuance which will expire on October 1, 2009.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Reset To Sep-17-09 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder Adult Abuse TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Temp: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Katy Bersamin/CSR#11722, Bailiff: F. Smith.

Andrew S. Schultz, Esq. for Maxine Duncan, Petitioner.

No appearance by the Respondent.

Mr. Schultz stated that they were still unable to serve the Respondent and requested a reissuance. The Court continued the matter and signed the reissuance which will expire on September 17, 2009.
